title: More Beautiful Pressure Plates
description: This mod adds around 240 new Pressure Plates and extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block
body:
This mod adds around 240 new Pressure Plates. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To create these new pressure plates you must first create the Pressure Plate Frame. Below examples of the recipe. You can use any pressure plate from the vanilla game for the recipe. You can now use the Pressure Plate Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. Some Pressure Plate emit light like their respective blocks.

All Pressure Plates

Example of Pressure Plate Frame recipe

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 5 pressure plates)

Magma Block Pressure Plate

Obsidian Cry Pressure Plate

Diamond Block Pressure Plate

Red Stained Glass Pressure Plate(All types of glass are present)

Special Pressure Plates

For some pressure plates you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Pressure Plate, Fire Soul Pressure Plate, Lava Pressure Plate(2 version), Nether Portal Pressure Plate and Strange Pressure Plate(no texture). ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use. With their 24/7 support and fast-response time, no issues shall stand in your way!  Use the promo code BLACKWOLF to get a 25% discount off your first month when buying any of their gaming servers.  https://bisecthosting.com/blackwolf ***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
